---
title: "Modern statistics for modern biology"
format: html
---

## Lectures

-   [Course overview](lectures/course_overview)
-   [Introduction to R](lectures/intro_to_R)
-   [Logical reasoning](lectures/logical_reasoning)
-   [From propositional logic to probability theory](lectures/from_propositional_logic_to_probability_theory)
-   [Bayesian inference](lectures/bayesian_inference)

## Notes
